message:
fix: align TestDoltStoreSearch with title-only search optimization (bd-2lfo)

The hq-319 search optimization changed free-text queries to search title+id
only (skipping description to avoid prolly-tree scans). This test still had
the search term in descriptions rather than titles, causing 0 results.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/refinery
Rig: beads
Role: refinery

files.patch:
@@ -822,16 +822,16 @@ func TestDoltStoreSearch(t *testing.T) {
 	issues := []*types.Issue{
 		{
 			ID:          "test-search-1",
-			Title:       "First Issue",
-			Description: "Search test one",
+			Title:       "Search test one",
+			Description: "First issue description",
 			Status:      types.StatusOpen,
 			Priority:    1,
 			IssueType:   types.TypeTask,
 		},
 		{
 			ID:          "test-search-2",
-			Title:       "Second Issue",
-			Description: "Search test two",
+			Title:       "Search test two",
+			Description: "Second issue description",
 			Status:      types.StatusOpen,
 			Priority:    2,
 			IssueType:   types.TypeBug,
